The Indigo Clinic

What Is Ailing Your Vehicle?

Tap everything that applies. We'll prescribe the exact Indigo treatment your car needs.

Watermarks (Paint & Windows)
Mineral deposits baked by the Kisumu sun. Hazy glass, white spots on paint.
Solution: Signature Spa + Indigo Ultra Spray Detailer (Silica-infused protection)
Filthy Fabric Interior
Bacteria and deep-seated grime. That smell that won't go away.
Solution: Steam Extraction + Indigo Miracle All Purpose Cleaner
Cracked or Dry Leather
"Once it cracks, it's gone." Sun and heat destroy untreated leather fast.
Solution: Indigo Magic Leather Conditioner deep hydration
Faded Dashboard & Trim
UV rot turning plastics chalky grey. Makes even a new car look old.
Solution: Indigo Premium Interior Dressing with UV blockers
Greasy Engine Bay
Heat-trapping filth that shortens engine life and masks leaks.
Solution: Steam Degrease + Indigo Bullet Degreaser
Faded Dull Tyres & Rims
Brown, chalky tyres and brake-dust-caked rims drag down the whole look.
Solution: Bullet Degreaser + Black Mamba Tyre & Trim Dressing

Your Indigo Prescription

Based on your diagnosis, here's what we recommend:

Service Menu

The Indigo Standard

One flagship service. Specialist add-ons. All executed to perfection at your location.

Flagship Service
The Indigo Signature Spa

Top-to-bottom restoration. We bring our own water and power — zero inconvenience.

Interior deep clean, vacuum, steam extraction & all-surfaces matte dressing Engine bay — steam, degrease and dress Exterior glow — pH neutral foam wash, sealant, watermark removal Elite wheel finish — degrease rims & tyres, dust-resistant matte tyre shine
